input.headline: Nasa releases new images of interstellar comet 3I/ATLAS

raw.headline: Nasa releases new images of interstellar comet 3I/ATLAS

winner: Why did NASA's new interstellar comet refuse to cooperate? Because it was tired of being outshone by all the Atlas stars!

candidates.text: NASA's latest photos reveal that Interstellar Comet 3I/ATLAS has finally sent back a selfie. The caption reads: "From Earth, with love.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Surprising twist with the 'selfie' and caption adds humor while staying specific to the headline."}

candidates.text: Why did the interstellar comet join a band? Because it wanted to play some cosmic tunes!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat related to the headline but lacks specificity and the humor is generic and predictable."}

candidates.text: Why did the comet bring a camera to a party? Because it wanted to snap some interstellar selfies!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat related to the headline but lacks specificity and surprise; 'interstellar selfies' is a mild pun without strong comedic impact."}

candidates.text: Why did NASA's new interstellar comet refuse to cooperate? Because it was tired of being outshone by all the Atlas stars!
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat creative with the wordplay on 'Atlas' but lacks specificity about the comet or NASA's images. The humor is mild and relies on a pun that may not be immediately clear to all audiences."}

candidates.text: Why did NASA's interstellar comet refuse to join a band? Because it didn't want to be labeled as a "shooting star.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 6.5, "reason": "The joke is somewhat relevant to the topic but lacks strong surprise or specificity. The pun on 'shooting star' is mild and could be seen as generic."}
